testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.domain.ad.AdMigrationTest

testcase.name: V40 enforces end_time greater than start_time via CHECK constraint()
V40 creates ads table with the columns the entity expects()
V40 enforces positive daily_play_count via CHECK constraint()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-02T23:50:28.830+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] org.flywaydb.core.FlywayExecutor : Database: jdbc:h2:mem:ads-ck-window-9f03c7c8-20f8-4b08-a010-073c9014a163 (H2 2.2) 2026-05-02T23:50:28.832+09:00 WARN 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] o.f.c.internal.database.base.Database : Flyway upgrade recommended: H2 2.2.224 is newer than this version of Flyway and support has not been tested.
